opening_angle: Connect GuidePoint’s focus on applied security engineering to Conner’s pattern of building and operating production-grade tooling that bridges security, automation, and cloud delivery
paragraph_focus: Direct alignment with GuidePoint’s engineering-first culture — emphasize operational reliability and deployable controls
Concrete evidence from UCOP role: production security systems, containerized services, AI-assisted tooling with governance
Earlier automation work and phishing project as proof of pragmatic, maintainable system-building
Reinforce cross-functional delivery pattern: ship, document, build guardrails — no hype, just reliability
voice_controls: Use phrases like 'deployable controls', 'hold up in production', 'reduce manual effort' — avoid 'passion for cybersecurity' or abstract mission statements
Replace vague claims with specific actions: e.g., 'I built runbooks that standardized remediation' not 'I improved security posture'
Avoid AI buzzwords; say 'RAG pipelines, LangChain, LLM developer tooling' only where directly supported
Keep sentences tight; no filler like 'leverage', 'synergy', or 'holistic'
